name: Boston Baked Soybeans
recipeInstructions:
1. One day ahead, cover dry soybeans with water and soak overnight.
2. Drain and rinse the soaked soybeans.
3. Cook the soaked soybeans for 2-3 hours covered in water over medium heat.
4. Save 1/2 cup of the cooking liquid.
5. Combine all ingredients in a baking dish.
6. Bake uncovered at 325°F (165°C) for one hour, stirring occasionally if desired.
7. Serves 8 to 10.
Soybean quick soak method:
Place soybeans in a large pot.
Add 6-8 cups of water per pound of dry beans.
Heat water to boiling and cook for 20 minutes.
Turn off the heat, cover the pot, and let stand for two hours.
Drain the beans and rinse thoroughly.
